nodes.name: driver-watchlist.md
nodes.summary: Knowledge base document listing Windows drivers known to cause issues on the user's machine. Provides a template for tracking driver status (BROKEN/UNSTABLE/MONITORING), impact, action, and safe versions. References common problematic drivers including AMD Ryzen Master, Intel WiFi, anti-cheat, and USB hub drivers.

nodes.name: machine-profile.md
nodes.summary: Knowledge base document storing the hardware and software profile of the user's machine for context during Windows error debugging. Used by the windows-error-debugger skill to provide machine-specific triage.

nodes.name: recurring-patterns.md
nodes.summary: Knowledge base document tracking recurring crash or error patterns observed on the user's Windows machine. Captures pattern descriptions, frequency, and historical context to accelerate triage.

nodes.name: resolved-issues.md
nodes.summary: Knowledge base document logging previously resolved Windows errors and crashes with their root causes and fixes. Serves as institutional memory for the windows-error-debugger skill.
